entity.label: Abdeel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Servant of God, (Jer. 36:26), the father of Shelemiah.

nodes.label: Abdeel
nodes.description: Servant of God, (Jer. 36:26), the father of Shelemiah.

verses.text: But the king commanded Jerahmeel the son of Hammelech, and Seraiah the son of Azriel, and Shelemiah the son of Abdeel, to take Baruch the scribe and Jeremiah the prophet: but the LORD hid them.
